description: Very positive experience from HR perspective. The system is easy to use and comprehensive.
author: Orla O.
pros: Excellent support team to follow up on any issues that arise.
cons: I raise issues as they come to me so any issues I don't like have been resolved

description: Overall Alkimii has been the best decision for the company they are so helpful , So user friendly to use , and has everything you will need , Checklist, HR , Revenue etc . Can run a really good business and see day to day results.
author: Lyndsey W.
pros: Customer service response rate is so fast and staff are always accommodating. Nothing is ever a hassle from them they are super helpful.
cons: Honestly be lying if i added something in this box. Alkimii have always been super helpful and anything i would find as a con would be due to something i would be personally looking for report wise but yet again Alkimii has came back and been able to build for me ;-)

author: Janiele G.
pros: How easy it is to manage my schedule for the coming week and it’s a handy tool when it comes to booking annual leave
cons: I don’t like how when it says I’ve got notifications and then when I click to open those notifications it doesn’t bring me anywhere.

description: Really good and efficient. Shift and holiday requests easy to process. Sending memos to staff and messaging within staffs working hours.
author: Sarah J.
pros: Rostering and managing hr requests and staff profiles. The easy onboarding processes. Staff being able to see just their own roster.
cons: Not being able to put in availability requests in and accessing for staff to approve shift swaps through the app

review_title: A great app, enjoyed by all the staff
description: Alkimii has helped to streamline the HR process while giving our staff a user friendly platform to view rosters, communicate and request days off.
author: Jason C.
pros: I love the fact that we no longer have to print lengthy induction packs, all documents can be issued and signed online.
cons: I find the holiday entitlement accrual difficult to understand for the employees

description: alkimii help are excellent in quick responses. generally very helpful, normally wen they can't help the thing you are requesting or asking hasn't been done before.
author: megan V.
pros: user of alkimii day to day. generally an easy system to use compared to others. very straight forward to teach teams how to use.
cons: some parts could be more streamline/better headers. the changes that are made, sometimes don't feel like for the better, makes you wonder who is requesting or checking these things from a user side before they are rolled out.

description: We only implemented Alkimii a few month ago and the process was flowless. Very helpful and quick in responding any query addressed.
author: Cris C.
pros: There is a wide range of reports that allows the user to effectively manage and process employee payroll.
cons: It takes long to develop and deliver a very simple report which is not defaulted. I requested a specific holiday report a few month ago and is still with the developers.

review_title: A powerful tool for streamlined operations and happy teams.
description: Alkimii People generally receives positive feedback, with users highlighting its user-friendliness, helpfulness, and comprehensive features for HR and financial management.
author: Julija S.
pros: its user-friendly interface and efficient handling of HR and operational tasks. Customers appreciate its ability to streamline processes like online document management, payroll, and rostering.
cons: I found that exporting reports to Excel from Alkimii can be time-consuming. Alkimii being unwilling to assist users who don't have a direct contract with them.

description: gave the highest rating to the Alkimii app because I genuinely find it user-friendly, efficient, and reliable for managing daily tasks. It has streamlined several processes for me, and the support team is always responsive. Based on my experience, I believe others would also benefit from its functionality and ease of use, which is why I’d confidently recommend it.
author: Mirela M.
pros: The communication and updates section it keeps everyone on the same page without needing constant emails or messages.
cons: My least favorite is after certain updates,creating or adjusting schedules can take a bit more time than before.

author: Carl W.
pros: The team are fantastic and very easy to deal with. They are very quick to respond and action/resolve any issues you have. Big thank you to [sensitive content hidden] for resolving a clock in/out issue one of our team members was having.
cons: No cons. We have only ever had positive experiences dealing with Alkimii and the team. Would highly recommend.

review_title: Alkimii - A One for all solution
author: Leah C.
pros: Contracts sending and acknowledgments is very easy and efficient in a way.
cons: Reports can be better. Employees due for probation reviews must be automatically sent to emails of the HR team for follow-up with GMs and HODs. It can be set as an email notification every week until it's completed.

author: Rob M.
pros: Their response time. So quick in reply to my queries.
cons: Nothing - They are so helpful and insightful.

description: I always find the team efficient and very quick to respond to any question big or small. they fix any query in prompt timing. I feel that they enjoy helping and get pleasure from there job.
author: Michelle C.
pros: Really helpful and quick to respond to any problem
cons: No bad experience to be able to comment on this question.

description: useful tool, help with forecast and payroll
author: Zuzana U.
pros: very helpful, user friendly, useful for forecasting
cons: There is nothing I do not like. It is user friendly system, easy to navigate.

description: Great customer services. Any time I have an issue with Alkimii or I require assistance the respond within minutes and usually have it fixed the same day
author: Laura L.
pros: The respond to all my queries within minutes.
cons: You don't always deal with the same person, but that hasn't been an issue when it comes to provide answers to my queries

description: Excellent experience. Very friendly staff. Fast turnaround time to tickets
author: Michelle C.
pros: Extremely helpful and knowledgeable. They are always eager to help
cons: I have nothing bad to say about this company
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: very helpful team, always willing to suggest options
author: Alessia B.
pros: the team is great, patient and 100% polite even if you call them dozens times a day!
cons: Nothing- some new team might not seam as "warm" as others, but always willing to help and explain

description: In the past I have worked with many onboarding companies and Alkimii People is by far efficient and productive. Many useful tools from onboarding to shift notes, newsfeed, communication, time management reports, archive etc.
author: Madina Z.
pros: The efficiency, easy to use, many features from onboarding to communication. Great customer service.
cons: I like everything about Alkimii People.

review_title: Great tool to help maintain or grow business finances, schedule events, etc.
description: So far, it was fantastic, no real complaints.
author: Dino S.
pros: Booking time off, keeping an eye on newsletters, clocking in and out and ease of sending contracts.
cons: If not updated, doesn't work at all. That's my only complaint

author: Liga M.
pros: The Alkimii platform offers an incredibly user-friendly experience, making it a breeze to navigate and utilize all its features seamlessly. It truly consolidates everything you need into a single, convenient location. From task management to communication tools.
cons: Alkimii People excels in its skills in basic task management and communication, however, there is scope for growth to better adapt to specific industry requirements and address more complex project management requirements. Offering additional customization options and greater flexibility in organizing and categorizing tasks and projects within the platform would greatly improve its usability and appeal to a wider range of users.

description: so delighted overall no problems at all even easy for beginners
author: sam N.
pros: easy to use you just need to follow the instructions on the screen
cons: n/a so good so far but on mobile would be better

author: Sarah M.
pros: That is it so straight forward and user friendly.
cons: Nothing comes mind anything I have an issue with the Alkimii team are always very quick to help

author: Lena N.
pros: Using Alkimii makes the Payroll and HR Functions very easy to administer.
cons: We recently installed a tablet for clocking in/out which is much improved on the fingerprint clock in.

description: Do you remember when you only had a bicycle to get to places you wanted to be ? Reimagined, how you felt when you first got a car and could ho where you wantrd when you wanted ? That’s how I feel about alkimii!
author: Michael V.
pros: Alkimii turns people management administration from a chore to a well choreographed seamless connection between the world or work and the management of time and documents. I can catch all the information I need and all the soft points, including birthdays and other notable events. Alkimii allows me to create my own work family app where we can all connect and share experiences. Time management is simplified Tasks become easier to standardise and perform. At a click I have access to so much information that was never before collated in one place. The AI tools are intuitive Time gained through the use of Alkimii is now spent on even more productivity. I’m a big fan. I can’t see how we could ruin my business without this app now!
cons: What’s not to like ? I really do not have any bugbears Alkimii answers my calls when I have a problem. I talk to a human !! Email queries are expertly answered

review_title: A Reliable and Essential Workforce Management Tool
description: My overall experience with Alkimii People has been outstanding. I’ve used the system for several years, and it has consistently performed at a high level. It has become an essential tool for managing labour cost and revenue tracking, and it has genuinely improved efficiency and clarity in our operations. I would highly recommend it to any business looking for a smart, user‑friendly workforce management solution.
author: Dave H.
pros: Alkimii People is incredibly intuitive and reliable. The system makes it easy to track labour costs and revenue with accuracy and consistency, and the interface is clean, modern, and simple to navigate. I especially appreciate how seamlessly it integrates into daily operations and how much time it saves when managing staffing and payroll information. The support team is also excellent—responsive, knowledgeable, and genuinely committed to helping users get the most out of the platform.
cons: There is very little to fault. Any minor improvements I’ve needed over the years have been addressed quickly through updates or support. Overall, the system has been extremely dependable.
